basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Staff Nurse, Visiting Psychological Counsellor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates not exceeding 30 years who have Intermediate (10+2) with Nursing qualification / B.Sc. Nursing / Master’s Degree or M.Phil. in Psychology with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Staff Nurse & Visiting Psychological Counsellor vacancies. The application process for IIM Raipur Recruitment 2026 is through walk-in interviews scheduled on 10 May 2026 and 17 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Not exceeding 30 years. Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India rules in force for SC / ST / OBC / PwD / Ex-Servicemen / EWS candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: General Nursing and Midwifery; OR Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) OR Master’s Degree (MA / M.Sc.) in PsychologyOR M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent; AND Pass in the examination conducted by the Nursing Council with a three-year course in General Nursing and Midwifery; OR Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Nursing from a recognised institution registered with the State Nursing Council. Minimum three years of post-qualification experience in a hospital recognised by the Central or State Nursing Council / an educational institute of repute. Visiting Psychological Counsellor: Master’s Degree (MA / M.Sc.) in Psychology with specialisation in Clinical Psychology, Counselling Psychology, Social Psychology or Applied Psychology from a recognised University or Institution in regular mode (not distance learning), with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent CGPA of 6.0; OR M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent CGPA of 6.0 from a recognised University or Institution. Minimum five years of post-qualification relevant experience in a reputed Higher Academic Institution.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- per month (consolidated) for both posts.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Staff Nurse post is scheduled for 10 May 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: For the Staff Nurse position, candidates need to have passed Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent and possess a three-year General Nursing and Midwifery course or a B.Sc. in Nursing, along with at least three years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is not exceeding 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these contract positions?
faq.answer: Both the Staff Nurse and Visiting Psychological Counsellor positions offer a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Visiting Psychological Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Visiting Psychological Counsellor post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these IIM Raipur jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these recruitment drives.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the IIM Raipur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for the Visiting Psychological Counsellor to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Visiting Psychological Counsellor will be held at IIM Raipur, Raipur, Chhattisgarh - 493661, on 17 May 2026.
